mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outing_record c
c.user_id= #{userId}
AND c.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND c.del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE outing_record SET status = '4' WHERE outing_record_id = #{id} AND status = '2' AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE outing_record SET del_flag = '1' WHERE customer_id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE outing_record SET del_flag = '1' WHERE user_id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
